title: Cornerstone Roadmap — open work by workstream

nodes.label:
✅ Lineup Engine v2
(milestone done)
nodes.description: All 7 issues closed: lineup-aware Formula Handlers, category rollup, PnR Ball Handler trait, tier retune 0/1/4/8/16, off/def rebounding split.

nodes.label:
✅ Snapshot Version Publishing
(milestone ~done)
nodes.description: Draft lifecycle, review queue, subset pipeline, publish gates, changelog — shipped. 3 stragglers remain (#86, #85, #51).

nodes.label:
✅ Lab UI/UX Improvements
(milestone ~done)
nodes.description: Team Shape glyphs, attribution ledger, eval-impact preview, score animation, drilldowns, Save & Publish ceremony (#94 — commit moment: restated eval, version pins, visibility choice, sealed copy) — shipped. 1 open (#100).

nodes.label:
🧍 #86 Giannis Elite OReb
regression (Snapshot, P1 bug)
nodes.description: Giannis shows Elite Offensive Rebounder; re-running the pipeline today changes results. Reproducibility bug in the stat→skill pipeline. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
✅ #85 Missing input caps tier
— SHIPPED (narrow)
nodes.description: SHIPPED (a0799e1). Added opt-in `missing_as_zero` to derived stats: an absent play-type frequency is zero volume (NBA.com drops a play type below its reporting floor), not unknown. Default keeps null-propagation where a null IS unknown (oliver_denominator's fga). Real scope: ONE tier league-wide (Max Strus). Jokic correctly stays None — 0.052 freq is below the 0.10 floor. The ~1,300 other 'phantom' Nones were not phantoms; Curry rates None at pnr_finisher because he is not a roll man.

nodes.label:
#51 pipeline_runs retention
(TTL or archival)
nodes.description: pipeline_runs table grows unbounded — pick TTL or archival policy. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #100 Player passing composite
(Lab, P2)
nodes.description: Earn collective_passing its Team Shape spoke — needs a player-level passing composite first. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
🧍 #95 Lineup viability threshold
investigation (P2 chore)
nodes.description: Plausible rotations score 0/1 viable — threshold likely miscalibrated. Investigation, waiting on human.

nodes.label:
#81 Claude pipeline off the
request path (P2 refactor)
nodes.description: Move the Claude skill-evaluation pipeline to background execution instead of blocking requests. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #80 Decouple scores from
LLM narrative (P2)
nodes.description: Deterministic scores return immediately; narrative generated async. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
#79 Cache cohesion team
narratives (P2)
nodes.description: Cache narratives keyed on player-set + ruleset version — avoids re-paying Claude for identical rosters. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
#58 M2 backend refactors
(P3, deferred)
nodes.description: Backend refactors deferred from the M2 review-fanout. Low priority cleanup batch.

nodes.label:
🧍 #15 Define Player Archetype
taxonomy
nodes.description: Design the archetype taxonomy (definitional work — human). Blocks #17.

nodes.label:
#17 Compute & display
Player Archetypes
nodes.description: Implement archetype computation and surface it in the UI. Agent-ready once taxonomy exists.

nodes.label:
#5 Saved Teams comparison
view (Public Surface)
nodes.description: Compare Saved Teams on the public surface. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
#102 Compare two Builds /
Saved Teams side by side (P3)
nodes.description: Side-by-side Build comparison in the Lab. Needs triage; overlaps #5 — likely one comparison surface serves both.

nodes.label:
#12 Redo live tips system
(Eval Version Publishing)
nodes.description: Rebuild the live tips system under the Evaluation Version Publishing milestone. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #107 VALUE CURRENCY (epic)
price players by skill
nodes.description: Epic. IRL salary makes the standard RuleSet a solved puzzle — Wemby is a top-3 skillset at $13.4M. Replace contract dollars with skill-derived prices: rank-pair players by an `overall` score against the real NBA salary curve. Legends get ladder prices too; the rookie-scale patch dies.

nodes.label:
#112 ball_security "stale"
— PHANTOM, close
nodes.description: RESOLVED as a no-op. The formula DOES read `steady_hand` (composites.py:139); the dead-key audit came back clean (22/22 skills referenced, 0 orphan coefficients). Luka's 0.0 was the steady_hand threshold (#113), not the formula. Real finding: thin composites are step functions with huge zero-mass — defensive_rebounding puts 60% of the NBA at 0.0. Folds into #114.

nodes.label:
✅ #114 None scores 0.0
— SHIPPED (tie-rank)
nodes.description: SHIPPED (9c97b8c). Deleted the `raw <= 0` short-circuit in _percentile_normalize — the percentile math already there now ranks a zero, self-calibrating it: shot_creation 0.1 (3% zeros), defensive_rebounding 3.0 (60%), post_game 3.8 (76%). No player scores 0.0 on any axis. Brunson keeps bad defense (1.2/0.9) but loses the structural rebounding penalty. TRAP IT SET: the PnR gate asked 'is there a screener?' via normalized == 0 — a lineup with no screener was scoring 7.99. Gate now reads RAW.

nodes.label:
✅ #113 steady_hand thresholds
— SHIPPED
nodes.description: SHIPPED. Six elite engines rated `None`, not just Luka — Jokic, Harden, Trae, Cade, Giannis, Luka. Capable's `tov_per_touch <= 0.045` floor bisected the creator cluster; Giannis missed by 0.0001. Fix: load-aware relief bump (usage >= 0.27 AND tov_pct <= 0.16 -> max Capable). 22 tier upgrades, no regressions. Snapshot Release published.

nodes.label:
✅ #108 Weighted `overall`
— SHIPPED (10/10)
nodes.description: SHIPPED (5df7362). Weighted percentile composites + 0.75 mean / 0.25 peak blend. Fit on CLEAN data (post-#114/#85): equal 6/10 -> prototype 7/10 -> shipped 10/10 of the Ringer top 10 inside our top 15. Mitchell Robinson 140th, Adams 184th, Gobert 228th. Weight ORDERING is a pinned constraint — left free, the search returns post_game as the 3rd most valuable thing in basketball. Convexity tried and failed.

nodes.label:
✅ #115 Brunson / Edwards
— RESOLVED by #114 + #108
nodes.description: RESOLVED. Brunson 31st -> 15th, Edwards 18th -> 13th, no data change. Was a symptom, exactly as the sequencing note predicted: #114 killed the phantom zeros (he read 'worst defender in the NBA' on BOTH axes), #108's creation-first weights did the rest.

nodes.label:
#109 Rank-pair price ladder
→ value_price (P1)
nodes.description: Sort players by `overall`, sort real salaries desc, pair them. NBA's own pay curve becomes the price ladder — no curve to tune, prices stay in dollars. OPEN: how legends sit above the top rung.

nodes.label:
🧍 #110 RuleSet `currency` flag
(P1)
nodes.description: rules_json.currency: market | value. Builder reads value_price under `value`. Cap, gauge, and picker filter keep working since units stay dollars.

nodes.label:
🧍 #111 Flip standard; retire
rookie-scale rule (P1)
nodes.description: The payoff. standard goes to value currency, flat legend_salary dies, the 2-rookie-scale-contract patch is deleted. Verify roster diversity actually improved.

nodes.label:
🧍 #117 No-data ≠ rated None
(P2)
nodes.description: An unrated player and a player rated `None` are different claims. Injured players fail the volume gate -> `None` -> 0.0. ball_security's proxy fires only on key-ABSENCE, so the missing key is all that protects them: Haliburton 9.2 -> 0.0 if backfilled. 14 players held back from #113's rollout live here.

nodes.label:
🧍 #118 Archetype-relative
`overall` (explore, P3)
nodes.description: Exploratory. Score a player only on the axes his archetype plays — Curry is never scored on post_game at all. Tie-ranking (#114) makes a zero honest; this makes it unnecessary. Parked behind the Archetype taxonomy (#15, #17). Must be reconciled with #108's weights — the two overlap.

nodes.label:
#116 Tests write to live DB;
3 fail on develop (P2)
nodes.description: pytest inserted real threshold_edit audit rows into the live Supabase — the calibration tests exercise the force-write path unmocked. Plus 3 tests already fail on develop (two pass a literal 'draft-uuid' to real Postgres; one calls _build_legend_prompt() with a stale signature).

nodes.label:
🧍 #119 Taxonomy can't see
3&D value (P2)
nodes.description: OG Anunoby scores 74th against a real 21st. NOT a weighting problem — adding him as a fit anchor costs the top-10 fit and still leaves him 60th. His creation is 5.4/4.5; the model has nothing to reward him FOR. Matchup versatility, playoff scalability and role scarcity are things the 21-skill taxonomy never measures. Becomes a PRICING EXPLOIT once #109 lands: 3&D wings get systematically underpriced — the same bug as Wemby-at-$13.4M in different clothes.

edges.label: taxonomy first
edges.description: Archetype computation can't start until the taxonomy is defined.

edges.label: shapes the cache
edges.description: Decoupling narrative generation decides what the narrative cache keys and stores.

edges.label: same async pattern
edges.description: Both move Claude calls off the request path — share the background-execution mechanism.

edges.label: overlapping scope
edges.description: Both are team-comparison views; triage #102 against #5 before building either.

edges.label: straggler
edges.description: Open bug left in an otherwise-shipped milestone.
